questions.question: PET plastic ka full form kya hai?

options.B: Polyester Ethylene Terephthalate

questions.explanation: PET ka full form Polyethylene Terephthalate hai, jo water bottles aur soft drink bottles mein commonly use hota hai.

questions.question: Kis plastic ko 'Recycle Code 2' se pehchana jaata hai?

options.B: HDPE

questions.explanation: HDPE (High-Density Polyethylene) ko Recycle Code 2 se denote kiya jaata hai, jaise milk jugs aur detergent bottles.

questions.question: Plastic waste ka environment par kya negative impact hota hai?

options.B: Marine life ko nuksan pahunchata hai
options.D: Water purification mein help karta hai

questions.explanation: Plastic waste oceans mein jaakar marine animals ko fasata hai ya unke digestive systems mein enter kar unhe nuksan pahunchata hai.

questions.question: Recycling process mein plastic ko kya kiya jaata hai?

options.B: Naye products banane ke liye process kiya jaata hai
options.C: Zameen mein dafna diya jaata hai
options.D: Samudra mein fenk diya jaata hai

questions.explanation: Recycling mein plastic waste ko collect, process aur naye products banane ke liye use kiya jaata hai.

questions.question: Upcycling kya hota hai?

options.B: Waste material ko low-value product mein convert karna
options.C: Waste material ko high-value product mein convert karna
options.D: Waste material ko landfill mein dalna

questions.explanation: Upcycling mein waste material ko aise products mein transform kiya jaata hai जिनकी value original se zyada hoti hai, bina uske basic structure ko badle.

questions.question: Kis type ka plastic bags banane ke liye commonly use hota hai?

options.B: LDPE

questions.explanation: LDPE (Low-Density Polyethylene) apni flexibility ke karan plastic bags, films aur wraps banane ke liye use hota hai.

questions.question: Plastic ke resin identification code mein '7' kya indicate karta hai?

options.B: HDPE

questions.explanation: Code 7 'Other' ya 'Mixed plastics' ko represent karta hai, jismein polycarbonate, nylon, aur multi-layer plastics shamil hote hain.

questions.question: Microplastics kya hain?

options.B: 5 mm se chhote plastic ke tukde

questions.explanation: Microplastics chote plastic ke particles hote hain, usually 5 millimeters se kam size ke, jo environment mein bade plastic ke breakdown se bante hain.

questions.question: Plastic recycling ka sabse bada fayda kya hai?

options.B: Landfill mein jaane wale waste ko kam karna
options.D: Plastic ko tezi se degrade karna

questions.explanation: Recycling se plastic waste landfills mein kam jaata hai, jo environment ke liye beneficial hai.

questions.question: Polystyrene (PS) commonly kis cheez mein use hota hai?

options.B: Detergent bottles

questions.explanation: Polystyrene (PS) disposable cups, plates, aur take-out food containers mein use hota hai.

questions.question: Plastic ke 'durability' ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Kitni jaldi plastic degrade hota hai
options.B: Kitni der tak plastic apni original form mein rehta hai
options.C: Kitna plastic recycle ho sakta hai

questions.explanation: Durability ka matlab hai ki ek material kitni der tak apne original properties ko maintain kar sakta hai, bina degrade hue.

questions.question: Plastic ke 'virgin material' se kya taatparya hai?

options.B: Naya plastic jo petroleum se bana ho

questions.explanation: Virgin material woh plastic hota hai jo seedhe petroleum ya natural gas se banta hai, na ki recycled sources se.

questions.question: PVC plastic ka ek common use case kya hai?

options.B: Grocery bags

questions.explanation: PVC (Polyvinyl Chloride) apni strength aur durability ke karan pipes, window frames, aur electrical insulation mein use hota hai.

questions.question: Plastic waste ko manage karne ke '3 R's' mein se ek kaun sa hai?

options.B: Reduce

questions.explanation: 3 R's hain Reduce (kam karna), Reuse (dobara istemal karna), aur Recycle (punarchakra karna).

questions.question: Biodegradable plastics ka kya fayda hai?

options.B: Natural processes se toot jaate hain
options.C: Sirf high temperatures par degrade hote hain

questions.explanation: Biodegradable plastics microbes aur natural processes ke through chhote molecules mein toot jaate hain, environment par kam impact daalte hain.

questions.question: Plastic ke 'downcycling' ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Waste ko high-value product mein badalna
options.B: Waste ko same-value product mein badalna
options.C: Waste ko low-value product mein badalna

questions.explanation: Downcycling mein waste material ko aise product mein convert kiya jaata hai jiski quality ya value original se kam ho jaati hai.

questions.question: India mein plastic waste management ke liye kaun sa act/rule lagoo hota hai?

options.A: Water (Prevention and Control of Pollution) Act
options.B: Air (Prevention and Control of Pollution) Act

questions.explanation: India mein Plastic Waste Management Rules, 2016 (aur uske amendments) plastic waste ke scientific management ko regulate karte hain.

questions.question: Source segregation ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Waste ko uske source par hi alag-alag karna
options.C: Waste ko ek jagah ikattha karna

questions.explanation: Source segregation ka matlab hai ki ghar ya office jaise source par hi waste ko alag-alag categories (jaise plastic, paper, wet waste) mein separate karna.

questions.question: Plastic waste collection ke liye kaun sa method sabse efficient hai?

options.B: Door-to-door collection
options.C: Sab waste ko ek hi bin mein dalna

questions.explanation: Door-to-door collection se households se segregated waste directly collect kiya jaata hai, jo contamination kam karta hai.

questions.question: Plastic waste ko collect karte samay kis cheez ka dhyaan rakhna chahiye?

options.A: Use kisi bhi tarah se compress karein
options.B: Usmein food waste mix na ho
options.D: Use kisi bhi chemical ke saath store karein

questions.explanation: Plastic waste mein food waste ya organic matter mix hone se contamination badh jaati hai, jo recycling process ko mushkil bana deta hai.

questions.question: MRF ka full form kya hai, plastic recycling ke context mein?

options.B: Material Recycling Facility

questions.explanation: MRF (Material Recycling Facility) woh jagah hoti hai jahan mixed waste ko sort aur process kiya jaata hai recycling ke liye.

questions.question: Plastic bottles ko collect karne se pehle kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Unmein se caps nikal deni chahiye
options.C: Unko ganda hi chhod dena chahiye
options.D: Unko kisi bhi liquid se bhar dena chahiye

questions.explanation: Plastic bottles se caps nikal deni chahiye kyunki caps alag type ke plastic ki ho sakti hain aur recycling process mein problem kar sakti hain.

questions.question: Manual sorting mein kya hota hai?

options.A: Machines plastic ko alag karti hain
options.B: Log hath se plastic ko alag karte hain
options.C: Plastic ko jala diya jaata hai
options.D: Plastic ko pani mein duboya jaata hai

questions.explanation: Manual sorting mein workers plastic waste ko hath se uske type aur colour ke hisaab se alag-alag karte hain.

questions.question: Automated sorting systems kis technology ka use karte hain?

options.B: Infrared sensors

questions.explanation: Automated sorting systems infrared sensors ka use karte hain alag-alag plastic types ko unki molecular structure ke basis par identify aur separate karne ke liye.

questions.question: Contamination ka kya matlab hai plastic recycling mein?

options.B: Plastic mein dusre materials ka milna

questions.explanation: Contamination tab hoti hai jab plastic waste mein food particles, paper, metal, ya dusre plastic types mix ho jaate hain, jo recycling quality ko kharab karte hain.

questions.question: Baling process ka kya uddeshya hai?

options.B: Plastic ko compact blocks mein compress karna

questions.explanation: Baling mein plastic waste ko hydraulic press ki madad se compact bales mein compress kiya jaata hai, jisse storage aur transport aasan ho jaata hai.

questions.question: Recycling ke liye sabse important step kya hai?

options.B: Segregation

questions.explanation: Accurate segregation hi high-quality recycled products ki foundation hai, kyunki yeh contamination ko kam karta hai.

questions.question: Plastic waste ko store karte samay kin baaton ka dhyaan rakhna chahiye?

options.B: Direct sunlight se bachayein
options.D: Hazardous chemicals ke paas store karein

questions.explanation: Direct sunlight plastic ko degrade kar sakti hai aur uski quality kam kar sakti hai, isliye use shaded ya covered area mein store karna chahiye.

questions.question: Plastic films ko segregate karna kyun mushkil hota hai?

options.B: Ye bahut light aur thin hote hain, machines mein fas sakte hain
options.D: Ye kabhi recycle nahi ho sakte

questions.explanation: Plastic films (jaise grocery bags) lightweight aur flexible hote hain, jo automated sorting machines mein jam ho sakte hain aur manual sorting bhi mushkil hoti hai.

questions.question: Dry waste collection center mein kis type ka plastic accept nahi kiya jaata?

options.B: HDPE containers

questions.explanation: Contaminated food packaging (jaise oil ya gravy wale packets) ko dry waste collection mein accept nahi kiya jaata kyunki wo dusre materials ko bhi contaminate kar sakte hain.

questions.question: Plastic waste collection mein informal sector ka kya role hai?

options.B: Waste pickers ke through collection mein bada yogdaan
options.C: Sirf high-value plastics collect karte hain
options.D: Waste ko jalane mein help karte hain

questions.explanation: Informal waste pickers India mein plastic waste collection aur sorting mein ek mahatvapurna bhoomika निभाते hain.

questions.question: Plastic waste ko clean karna kyun zaroori hai?

options.B: Recycling process ko efficient banane aur final product ki quality improve karne ke liye
options.D: Usse aur zyada ganda karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Cleaning se contaminants hat jaate hain, jisse recycling process smooth hota hai aur recycled plastic ki quality achhi rehti hai.

questions.question: Compression ratio kya hota hai baling process mein?

options.B: Kitna material compress kiya gaya
options.C: Original volume aur compressed volume ka ratio

questions.explanation: Compression ratio yeh darshata hai ki kitna volume waste ko compress karke kitna kam kiya gaya hai, jo storage aur transport efficiency ke liye important hai.

questions.question: Plastic waste ko segregate karne ke baad use kaise store karna chahiye?

options.B: Weatherproof containers mein

questions.explanation: Weatherproof containers mein store karne se plastic moisture, dirt aur sunlight se bacha rehta hai, jo uski quality maintain karta hai.

questions.question: Plastic recycling mein 'shredding' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Plastic ko chote tukdon mein kaatna

questions.explanation: Shredding process mein bade plastic items ko chhote flakes ya granules mein toda jaata hai, jisse unhe aage process karna aasaan ho.

questions.question: Plastic recycling mein 'washing' step kyun important hai?

options.A: Plastic ka colour change karne ke liye
options.B: Plastic se dirt, labels aur food residue hatane ke liye
options.C: Plastic ko hard banane ke liye
options.D: Plastic ko melt karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Washing se contaminants remove ho jaate hain, jisse recycled plastic ki quality achhi rehti hai aur final product high-grade banta hai.

questions.question: Extrusion process mein kya hota hai?

options.A: Plastic ko thanda kiya jaata hai
options.B: Plastic ko high temperature par melt karke die se guzara jaata hai
options.C: Plastic ko chote tukdon mein kaata jaata hai

questions.explanation: Extrusion mein, shredded aur cleaned plastic ko melt karke ek screw ke through die se push kiya jaata hai, jisse continuous strands bante hain.

questions.question: Pelletizing ka final product kya hota hai?

options.B: Small uniform plastic pellets

questions.explanation: Pelletizing mein extruded plastic strands ko chhote, uniform pellets mein kaata jaata hai, jo naye plastic products banane ke liye raw material hote hain.

questions.question: Mechanical recycling kya hai?

options.A: Plastic ko chemical reactions se todna
options.B: Plastic ko physical processes (jaise shredding, melting) se recycle karna

questions.explanation: Mechanical recycling mein plastic ko physically process kiya jaata hai, jaise sorting, washing, shredding, melting aur pelletizing, bina uski chemical structure badle.

questions.question: Chemical recycling kis principle par kaam karta hai?

options.B: Plastic ko chemically todkar uske basic monomers ya fuels mein convert karna
options.C: Plastic ko melt karke naye shape dena

questions.explanation: Chemical recycling mein plastic waste ko chemical reactions ke through uske original building blocks (monomers) ya fuel-like substances mein convert kiya jaata hai.

questions.question: rPET ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Recycled PET

questions.explanation: rPET ka matlab hai recycled PET, jo recycled plastic bottles se bana hota hai aur naye bottles ya fibers banane mein use hota hai.

questions.question: Flotation tank ka use kya hai plastic recycling mein?

options.B: Alag-alag density wale plastics ko separate karne ke liye
options.D: Plastic ko melt karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Flotation tanks mein pani ki density ka use karke alag-alag plastic types (jo float ya sink karte hain) ko separate kiya jaata hai.

questions.question: Plastic flakes ko drying process se kyun guzara jaata hai?

options.B: Unmein se moisture remove karne ke liye
options.C: Unka colour change karne ke liye
options.D: Unko aur ganda karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Moisture ki presence extrusion process mein problems create kar sakti hai aur final product ki quality ko degrade kar sakti hai, isliye drying important hai.

questions.question: Single-screw extruder aur Twin-screw extruder mein kya antar hai?

options.A: Single-screw mein sirf ek heater hota hai, Twin-screw mein do
options.B: Single-screw mein ek rotating screw hota hai, Twin-screw mein do
options.C: Single-screw sirf PET ke liye hai, Twin-screw sabhi plastics ke liye

questions.explanation: Single-screw extruder mein ek screw hota hai, jabki Twin-screw extruder mein do screws hote hain jo better mixing aur higher output provide karte hain, especially for complex polymers.

questions.question: Recycled plastic se bane common products kaun se hain?

options.B: New plastic bottles, plastic lumber, fleece jackets

questions.explanation: Recycled plastic se naye bottles, construction materials, clothing fibers, furniture aur automotive parts banaye jaate hain.

questions.question: Degassing ka kya role hai extrusion process mein?

options.B: Melted plastic se trapped gases aur moisture nikalna

questions.explanation: Degassing se melted plastic mein maujood gases aur moisture ko remove kiya jaata hai, jisse final product mein bubbles aur defects nahi aate.

questions.question: Agglomerator machine ka kya function hai?

options.B: Soft plastic films ko densify karna

questions.explanation: Agglomerator soft plastic films aur bags ko heat aur friction se densify karke irregular granules mein convert karta hai, jo aage extrusion ke liye suitable hote hain.

questions.question: Density separation technique kis principle par based hai?

options.B: Magnetic properties

questions.explanation: Density separation mein alag-alag density wale plastic types ko ek liquid medium (usually water) mein float ya sink karwa ke alag kiya jaata hai.

questions.question: Hot wash system ka kya fayda hai?

options.B: Ziddi contaminants jaise oil, glue aur labels ko remove karta hai

questions.explanation: Hot wash system garam pani aur detergents ka use karta hai taaki ziddi contaminants ko effectively remove kiya ja sake, jo cold wash se mushkil hota hai.

questions.question: Plastic recycling plant mein chiller ka kya role hai?

options.B: Extruded plastic strands ko thanda karna

questions.explanation: Chiller extruded plastic strands ko pani mein se guzar kar jaldi thanda karta hai, jisse unhe pelletizing ke liye ready kiya ja sake.

questions.question: Recycled plastic ki quality ko kaun se factors affect karte hain?

options.B: Original plastic ki quality, contamination level, aur recycling process ki efficiency

questions.explanation: Original plastic ki quality, contamination ka level, aur recycling process mein use kiye gaye equipment aur techniques sab recycled plastic ki final quality ko impact karte hain.

questions.question: Upcycling mein plastic waste ka kya hota hai?

options.B: Use naye, high-value products mein transform kiya jaata hai
options.C: Use low-value products mein convert kiya jaata hai

questions.explanation: Upcycling mein plastic waste ko creatively use karke aise items banaye jaate hain जिनकी value original waste se zyada hoti hai.

questions.question: Plastic bottles ko upcycle karke kya banaya ja sakta hai?

options.B: Plant pots, pen holders, decorative items

questions.explanation: Plastic bottles ko kaat kar, paint karke ya dusre materials ke saath jodkar plant pots, pen holders, ya toys jaise useful aur decorative items banaye ja sakte hain.

questions.question: Plastic bags ko upcycle karne ka ek common tareeka kya hai?

options.B: Unhe shred karke yarn banana aur bunna

questions.explanation: Plastic bags ko kaat kar 'plarn' (plastic yarn) banaya jaata hai, jisse mats, bags, aur dusre woven items banaye ja sakte hain.

questions.question: DIY upcycling projects ke liye kaun sa tool sabse zaroori hai?

options.B: Creativity aur basic craft tools

questions.explanation: Upcycling mein creativity aur simple tools jaise scissors, glue, paint, aur cutter ka use hota hai.

questions.question: Plastic bottle caps se kya upcycle kiya ja sakta hai?

options.B: Art mosaics, coasters, ya small decorative items

questions.explanation: Bottle caps ko collect karke unhe art projects, coasters ya chote toys banane mein use kiya ja sakta hai, unke colour aur shape ka fayda uthate hue.

questions.question: Upcycled products ka market potential kaisa hota hai?

options.B: Niche market mein high demand ho sakti hai

questions.explanation: Unique, eco-friendly aur aesthetically pleasing upcycled products ki demand ek niche market mein, especially among environmentally conscious consumers, high ho sakti hai.

questions.question: Plastic waste se jewellery banane ke liye kis upcycling technique ka use ho sakta hai?

options.B: Cutting, heating (shaping), aur painting

questions.explanation: Plastic sheets, bottles ya caps ko kaat kar, halka heat dekar shape karke, aur paint ya embellish karke unique jewellery items banaye ja sakte hain.

questions.question: Ek upcycled product ki value increase karne ke liye kya zaroori hai?

options.B: High-quality craftsmanship aur creative design

questions.explanation: Achi craftsmanship, innovative design aur finishing ek upcycled product ko attractive aur valuable banati hai.

questions.question: Plastic waste se furniture banane ke liye kaun sa plastic type suitable ho sakta hai?

options.B: Thick plastic containers (HDPE, PP) aur bottles

questions.explanation: HDPE aur PP jaise sturdy plastics, jo buckets, barrels ya thick bottles mein paaye jaate hain, furniture banane ke liye suitable ho sakte hain jab unhe sahi tarike se process kiya jaaye.

questions.question: Plastic waste se planter box banane ke liye kya karna padega?

options.B: Bade plastic containers (jaise oil cans) ko kaatna aur drain holes banana
options.C: Plastic ko melt karke naya mold banana

questions.explanation: Bade plastic containers ko upcycle karke planter box banaya ja sakta hai, bas unhe kaat kar aur drainage ke liye holes banana zaroori hai.

questions.question: Plastic waste art installations banane ka kya fayda hai?

options.B: Environmental awareness badhana aur aesthetic value create karna

questions.explanation: Plastic waste se bani art installations logon ka dhyaan plastic pollution ki taraf kheenchte hain aur recycling aur upcycling ke mahatva ko emphasize karte hain.

questions.question: Upcycling mein 'design thinking' ka kya mahatva hai?

options.A: Sirf product ka colour decide karna
options.B: Waste material ki limitations aur possibilities ko samajhkar innovative solutions develop karna

questions.explanation: Design thinking upcycling mein creativity aur problem-solving ko encourage karta hai, jisse waste materials se functional aur attractive products banaye ja saken.

questions.question: Plastic bottles se 'eco-bricks' banane ka kya purpose hai?

options.B: Non-recyclable plastic waste ko bottles mein pack karke construction blocks banana

questions.explanation: Eco-bricks mein plastic bottles ko non-recyclable plastic waste se tightly pack kiya jaata hai, jisse wo construction mein use hone wale blocks ban jaate hain.

questions.question: Plastic waste se 'vertical gardens' banane ka kya fayda hai?

options.B: Kam jagah mein zyada plants lagana aur plastic ko reuse karna

questions.explanation: Plastic bottles ya containers ko upcycle karke vertical gardens banane se kam jagah mein gardening ho sakti hai aur plastic waste ka creative reuse bhi hota hai.

questions.question: Upcycling ke liye plastic ko prepare karte samay kaun sa step sabse important hai?

options.B: Usko achhe se saaf karna aur sukhana

questions.explanation: Saaf aur sukha plastic hi upcycling ke liye best hota hai, kyunki dirt aur moisture finished product ki quality ko affect kar sakte hain.

questions.question: Plastic waste se unique home decor items banane mein kis cheez ki zaroorat hoti hai?

options.B: Creative vision aur artistic skills

questions.explanation: Home decor items banane mein aesthetic sense, design skills aur creativity ki zaroorat hoti hai taaki waste ko attractive pieces mein badal sakein.

questions.question: Upcycling projects mein 'safety' ka kya mahatva hai?

options.B: Sharp tools aur heating elements ka use karte samay khud ko bachana
options.D: Product ko achhe se pack karna

questions.explanation: Upcycling projects mein cutting, drilling, ya heating involved ho sakta hai, isliye personal safety jaise gloves, eye protection ka dhyaan rakhna zaroori hai.

questions.question: Plastic recycling unit mein kaam karte samay kaun sa PPE zaroori hai?

options.B: Safety goggles, gloves, aur sturdy shoes

questions.explanation: Safety goggles aankhon ko flying particles se bachate hain, gloves hatho ko cuts aur chemicals se, aur sturdy shoes pairon ko girne wali cheezon se.

questions.question: Fire safety ke liye plastic recycling plant mein kya hona chahiye?

options.B: Fire extinguishers, smoke detectors, aur clear emergency exits

questions.explanation: Fire extinguishers aag bujhane ke liye, smoke detectors aag ka pata lagane ke liye, aur clear emergency exits surakshit bahar nikalne ke liye zaroori hain.

questions.question: Machine par kaam karte samay kaun si safety precaution leni chahiye?

options.B: Machine ko bina training ke operate karna
options.C: Machine ke moving parts se dur rehna aur safety guards ka use karna
options.D: Machine ko chalte waqt saaf karna

questions.explanation: Moving parts se dur rehna aur safety guards ka use karna accidents se bachata hai. Loose kapde ya jewellery machines mein fas sakte hain.

questions.question: Plastic waste handling mein 'dust' ka kya risk hai?

options.B: Respiratory problems aur fire hazard

questions.explanation: Plastic dust ko saans lene se lung problems ho sakti hain, aur high concentrations mein yeh dust explosive bhi ho sakti hai.

questions.question: Waste water management plastic recycling mein kyun zaroori hai?

options.B: Washing process se nikle gande pani ko treat karke environment mein safely discharge karne ke liye
options.C: Pani ko aur ganda karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Recycling mein use hone wala pani contaminants se bhar jaata hai, isliye use treat karna zaroori hai taaki environmental pollution na ho.

questions.question: Noise pollution ko control karne ke liye kya steps liye ja sakte hain?

options.A: Bina ear protection ke kaam karna
options.B: Noise-reducing ear protection (earplugs/earmuffs) pehenna aur machinery ko soundproof enclosures mein rakhna

questions.explanation: Recycling machinery se high noise level nikalta hai, jo hearing loss ka karan ban sakta hai. Ear protection aur noise control measures zaroori hain.

questions.question: Hazardous waste ko kaise handle karna chahiye?

options.A: Normal waste ke saath mix kar dena
options.B: Properly label karke, separate containers mein store karna aur authorized disposal agencies ko dena

questions.explanation: Hazardous waste ko proper handling aur disposal ki zaroorat hoti hai taaki human health aur environment ko nuksan na ho.

questions.question: First Aid kit plastic recycling unit mein kyun zaroori hai?

options.B: Minor injuries ka turant ilaj karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Kaam ke dauran chot lag sakti hai, aur First Aid kit se turant ilaj mil jaata hai, jo badi problem banne se rokta hai.

questions.question: Ergonomics ka kya matlab hai workplace safety mein?

options.B: Workplace aur equipment ko is tarah design karna ki workers comfortable aur efficient tareeke se kaam kar saken, injuries ka risk kam ho

questions.explanation: Ergonomics ka aim hai workplace ko human body ke liye optimized banana, jisse stress, strain aur musculoskeletal disorders ka risk kam ho.

questions.question: Electrical safety ke liye kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Loose wires ko chhod dena
options.C: Sabhi electrical connections ko inspect karna, damaged wires ko replace karna aur machines ko properly earth karna
options.D: Wet hands se electrical switches ko touch karna

questions.explanation: Damaged electrical equipment aur improper earthing se electric shock aur fire ka khatra hota hai, isliye regular inspection aur maintenance zaroori hai.

questions.question: Environmental Compliance ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Environmental laws aur regulations ko follow karna
options.D: Waste ko kahin bhi fenk dena

questions.explanation: Environmental Compliance ka matlab hai ki business operations environmental laws, rules aur standards ke anusaar hon, taaki pollution kam ho.

questions.question: Plastic recycling industry mein 'Extended Producer Responsibility' (EPR) ka kya role hai?

options.B: Producers ki zimmedari ki wo apne products ke life-cycle ke end mein unhe collect aur recycle karein

questions.explanation: EPR ek policy approach hai jahan producers ko apne products ke post-consumer stage, jaise collection, sorting aur recycling ki financial aur physical responsibility di jaati hai.

questions.question: Safety Data Sheet (SDS) kya provide karta hai?

options.B: Chemical products ke hazards, safe handling procedures, aur emergency measures ki detailed information

questions.explanation: SDS ek document hai jo hazardous substances ke safe handling, storage, aur emergency procedures ke baare mein critical information deta hai.

questions.question: Confined space entry ke liye kya precaution leni chahiye?

options.A: Bina kisi ke andar chale jaana
options.B: Proper training, permit-to-work system, gas monitoring aur rescue plan
options.D: Sirf jaldi se kaam karke nikal jaana

questions.explanation: Confined spaces mein oxygen deficiency, toxic gases ya flammable atmosphere ka khatra ho sakta hai, isliye strict safety protocols follow karna zaroori hai.

questions.question: Plastic recycling plant mein ventilation system kyun zaroori hai?

options.A: Plants ko thanda rakhne ke liye
options.B: Air pollutants, dust aur fumes ko remove karne aur fresh air provide karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Proper ventilation se air quality maintain hoti hai aur workers ko harmful fumes ya dust se bachaya jaata hai.

questions.question: Emergency preparedness plan mein kya shamil hona chahiye?

options.B: Evacuation routes, emergency contact numbers, aur roles/responsibilities in case of emergency

questions.explanation: Emergency plan workers ko kisi bhi unforeseen incident (fire, accident) mein surakshit rehne aur response karne ke liye guide karta hai.

questions.question: Recycled plastic products ka sabse bada market kaun sa hai?

options.B: Packaging industry

questions.explanation: Recycled plastic ka ek bada hissa naye packaging materials (jaise rPET bottles) banane mein use hota hai.

questions.question: Circular Economy ka kya concept hai?

options.A: Products ko ek baar use karke fenk dena
options.B: Resources ko reuse, recycle aur repair karke waste ko minimize karna

questions.explanation: Circular Economy ek economic system hai jismein waste aur pollution ko design out kiya jaata hai, products aur materials ko use mein rakha jaata hai, aur natural systems ko regenerate kiya jaata hai.

questions.question: Plastic recycling business start karne ke liye sabse pehla step kya hai?

options.B: Market research aur business plan banana

questions.explanation: Kisi bhi business ko start karne se pehle market research karna aur ek solid business plan banana zaroori hai taaki feasibility aur potential ko samjha ja sake.

questions.question: Recycled plastic products ki marketing karte samay kis cheez par focus karna chahiye?

options.B: Unke environmental benefits aur quality

questions.explanation: Consumers environment-friendly products ki taraf attract hote hain, isliye unke environmental benefits aur recycled material ki quality par highlight karna chahiye.

questions.question: Small-scale plastic upcycling business ke liye kaun sa skill set zaroori hai?

options.B: Creative design, craftsmanship aur basic marketing skills

questions.explanation: Upcycling mein creativity, hath se kaam karne ki skill aur apne products ko bechne ke liye basic marketing knowledge honi chahiye.

questions.question: Government schemes plastic recycling businesses ko kaise support karti hain?

options.B: Subsidies, loans aur technical assistance provide karke

questions.explanation: Governments environmental initiatives ko promote karne ke liye recycling businesses ko financial aur technical help provide karti hain.

questions.question: Value chain in recycling mein 'collection' ke baad kaun sa step aata hai?

options.B: Sorting aur processing

questions.explanation: Collection ke baad plastic waste ko uske type ke hisaab se sort kiya jaata hai aur phir washing, shredding jaise processes se guzara jaata hai.

questions.question: Recycled plastic ki demand kaun badha sakta hai?

options.B: Consumers ki preference, brand commitments aur legislation

questions.explanation: Jab consumers recycled products ko prefer karte hain, brands recycled content use karne ka commitment karte hain, aur governments recycling ko promote karti hain, tab demand badhti hai.

questions.question: Business plan mein 'Executive Summary' ka kya mahatva hai?

options.B: Poore business plan ka concise overview jo investors ko attract kare

questions.explanation: Executive Summary business plan ka sabse important section hota hai, jo poore plan ka brief overview deta hai aur readers ko engage karta hai.

questions.question: Recycling business mein 'supply chain' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Raw material collection se lekar final product delivery tak ka poora network

questions.explanation: Supply chain mein collection, sorting, processing, manufacturing aur distribution jaise sabhi steps shamil hote hain.

questions.question: Pitch deck kya hota hai ek entrepreneur ke liye?

options.B: Investors ko apne business idea ko present karne ke liye ek brief presentation

questions.explanation: Pitch deck ek short presentation hai jo entrepreneurs investors ko apne business model, vision aur financial projections ke baare mein inform karne ke liye use karte hain.

questions.question: Plastic recycling business mein 'profitability' kin factors par depend karti hai?

options.B: Raw material ki availability, processing cost, aur recycled product ki market price

questions.explanation: Raw material ki stable supply, efficient processing, aur recycled products ke liye achha market price hi profitability determine karta hai.

questions.question: Social entrepreneurship ka plastic recycling mein kya role hai?

options.B: Environmental problem solve karte hue social impact aur financial sustainability achieve karna

questions.explanation: Social entrepreneurship mein businesses environmental aur social challenges ko address karte hain, jaise plastic pollution aur livelihood creation, saath hi financial returns bhi generate karte hain.

questions.question: Plastic recycling business ke liye 'permits aur licenses' kyun zaroori hain?

options.B: Legal compliance, environmental standards aur safe operations ensure karne ke liye
options.C: Business ko slow karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Permits aur licenses yeh ensure karte hain ki business legal frameworks, safety standards aur environmental regulations ko follow kar raha hai.

questions.question: Brand building upcycled products ke liye kyun important hai?

options.B: Product ko unique identity dena, customer loyalty banana aur market mein differentiate karna

questions.explanation: Strong brand building se upcycled products ko ek distinct identity milti hai, jo unhe competitive market mein alag khada karti hai aur customers ko attract karti hai.

questions.question: Plastic recycling business mein 'risk assessment' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Potential risks (financial, operational, environmental) ko identify karna aur unhe manage karne ke liye strategies develop karna
options.C: Sirf market size ka pata lagana

questions.explanation: Risk assessment business ke liye crucial hai, kyunki yeh potential problems ko pehle hi identify kar unhe mitigate karne mein help karta hai, jisse business ki sustainability badhti hai.
